quote: “The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single misstep.”

“Can you buckle up please?
And here we go!”
“Michael, this is highly ill-advised.”
“The more you have, the more you have to lose.”
“The chase is better than the catch.”
“Imitation is the most sincere form of flattery.”
“An 86 is a car that trains the driver.”

arcana: VII — The Chariot (Rental Car / VW Golf)
quote: “It is the fastest car in the world — because it’s rented.”

“I’ll use my left foot for braking…
to make up for the lack of torque in 3rd.”

“I lied to you. I lied to everybody.
That’s what I do best.”
“Fate leads the willing and drags along the reluctant.”
“Drive to arrive.”

arcana: XII — The Hanged Man (Iveco Daily Camper)
quote:
“Perfection is achieved, not when there is nothing more to add,
but when there is nothing left to take away.”

arcana: XIII — Death (Good Smile Racing AMG GT3 / Miku)
quote:
“A thousand cherry trees disappear into the night,
and not even your voice will be able to reach.”
“Delivering for Ireland.”
“Even if she is a devil… I love her.”
“You can’t live with regrets. You can’t live with what if.”

“Maybe we’ll bump into each other sometime again in the future.
Or in the past.”
“Dude, I almost had you!”
“I owe you a ten-second car.”
“You won’t see me. I’ll be there.”

“Marty, you can’t go losing your judgment every time someone calls you a name.
That’s exactly what causes you to get into that accident in the future.”
